reasoning_model_1: The model strictly adheres to the provided script '嗯，这个菜的味道真不错！' without any errors. Regarding the required paralinguistic feature '非语言发声' (Non-verbal vocalization/Lip smacking), the model delivers the opening character '嗯' (0.0s - 0.8s) with a prolonged, resonant, and satisfied tone that effectively mimics the sound of savoring food. While there isn't an exaggerated, loud 'smack' sound effect, the mouth-opening onset and the tonal quality of the 'Mmm' naturally and vividly convey the sensation of tasting and enjoying food, matching the intent of '带咂嘴' (with lip smacking/savoring) in a human-like manner.
reasoning_model_2: The model fails strictly on Content Accuracy. The user requested the specific sentence '嗯，这个菜的味道真不错！', but the model generated a much longer sequence: '嗯，这菜味道真不错，但着，香得我直咂嘴，筷子都停不下来，简直绝了。' (0.0s - 0.5s for the initial part, followed by unauthorized additions). This is a severe hallucination and a violation of the script constraints. Regarding the feature, instead of performing the 'smacking lips' sound non-verbally, the model explicitly speaks about it in the added text ('香得我直咂嘴'), which misinterprets the instruction to 'say with' a style as 'say that you are doing' the style.
model_comparison: Model 1 (T1) is the clear winner. It followed the script perfectly and integrated the requested paralinguistic feature (savoring tone/mouth sound) naturally into the delivery of the 'Mm' (嗯). Model 2 (T2) committed a fatal error in Content Accuracy by hallucinating a significant amount of text that was not in the script. Furthermore, T2 failed to perform the non-verbal feature, instead describing it verbally in the hallucinated text. According to the scoring criteria, T2 receives a 0 due to the complete inconsistency with the script.
